screen.pplshop.title: PPLShop Shops
screen.pplshop.sort.name: name
screen.pplshop.status.never_refreshed: The shop list has not been refreshed yet
screen.pplshop.banner.stale: The list has not been refreshed for a while. New shop signs may be missing.
screen.pplshop.banner.low_entries: Only %s signs were found. Expected at least %s. Refresh the sign list.
message.pplshop.refresh_in_progress: Shop sign refresh is already running
message.pplshop.refresh_confirm: Refreshing shop signs can briefly lower FPS. Press refresh again to start.
message.pplshop.refresh_started: Shop sign refresh started. Short FPS drops are possible.
message.pplshop.refresh_finished: Shop sign refresh finished: %s offers, %s unresolved.
config.pplshop.title: PPLShop Settings
config.pplshop.subtitle: How PPLShop finds signs, refreshes the list, and stores data
config.pplshop.show_stale_cache_warning: Warn when the sign list is old
Shows a warning when the list has not been refreshed for a while and new shop signs may be missing.
config.pplshop.auto_refresh_mode: Auto refresh when opening the list
config.pplshop.auto_refresh_mode.tooltip: How often PPLShop automatically searches signs when you open the list.
config.pplshop.suppress_manual_refresh_w: If enabled, refresh starts immediately from the button or hotkey. If disabled, you must press twice to avoid accidental refreshes.
config.pplshop.preferred_price_basis.too: Chooses whether the list focuses on the whole purchase price or the price for one item.
config.pplshop.auto_refresh_if_snapshot_: Refresh if too few signs were found
If the list looks suspiciously small, PPLShop will start a sign search when the window opens.
config.pplshop.persist_cache_between_ses: Remember the list after restarting the game
Saves found signs to a file and shows them immediately after the next login until you refresh the list.
If fewer signs are found, the window shows a warning and may suggest refreshing.
config.pplshop.refresh_budget_per_tick.t: Higher values refresh faster, but increase load and may cause short FPS drops.
screen.pplshop.status_badge.tooltip.reco: The sign list was updated recently.
The list is still usable, but refreshing soon is recommended.
The list may be incomplete. Refresh it.
There is no refresh history yet.
screen.pplshop.status_badge.tooltip.load: The list was loaded from a saved file after joining.
screen.pplshop.status_badge.tooltip.reco: The list is not new anymore, but it is still usable.
The list is old. New offers may be missing.
The list has not been updated yet.
screen.pplshop.status_badge.tooltip.low_: There are still few signs in the list: %s / %s.
screen.pplshop.status_badge.tooltip.refr: The list is being updated right now.
